rationale: Unconditional capable(CAP_SYS_ADMIN) at function entry — _classify_call_site_grade returns DOMINATES (depth 1, no preceding return). Cap at line 2, sink at line 79 (77 lines apart). With DOMINATES grade, the proximity gate is dropped (cap_line < sink_line is sufficient). CAP_SYS_ADMIN is in _PRIVILEGED_CAP_CONSTANTS → verdict NOT_EXPLOITABLE. Tests axis-4's three-grade proximity (previously only SAME_FUNCTION with ±50 gate).
